---
title: "Data exploration"
author: "Mahfuza Haque Mahi"
date: "2026-03-23"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(pwr)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(powertools)
library(ggplot2)
library(reshape2)
raw_dat <- read.csv(here::here("Project2/DataRaw", "PrelimData.csv"))
```

```{r}
### Basic structure check
glimpse(raw_dat)
summary(raw_dat)

# Missing data 
colSums(is.na(raw_dat))               # count NAs per column
mean(is.na(raw_dat))                  # overall % missing

# Distributions (histograms) 
raw_dat %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "variable", values_to = "value") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = value)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 10, fill = "steelblue", color = "white") +
  facet_wrap(~variable, scales = "free") +
  labs(title = "Distribution of All Variables")

# Boxplots (spot outliers) 
raw_dat %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "variable", values_to = "value") %>%
  ggplot(aes(y = value)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.6) +
  facet_wrap(~variable, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(title = "Boxplots — Outlier Check")

```


```{r}
## Pairwise correlations
cor_mat <- cor(raw_dat, use = "complete.obs")
round(cor_mat, 3)
```

```{r}
## Scatter plots
library(GGally) 
plot <- ggpairs(raw_dat,
        lower = list(continuous = wrap("smooth", alpha = 0.4, color = "steelblue")),
        diag  = list(continuous = wrap("densityDiag", fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.5)),
        title = "Pairs Plot")

plot
```

```{r}
#Predictor–outcome scatterplots 
# IL-6 vs outcomes
p1 <- ggplot(raw_dat, aes(x = IL_6, y = CVLT_CNG3)) +
  geom_point() + geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  labs(title = "IL-6 vs CVLT Change")

p2 <- ggplot(raw_dat, aes(x = IL_6, y = CORT_CNG3)) +
  geom_point() + geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  labs(title = "IL-6 vs Cortical Thickness Change")

# MCP-1 vs outcomes
p3 <- ggplot(raw_dat, aes(x = MCP_1, y = CVLT_CNG3)) +
  geom_point() + geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  labs(title = "MCP-1 vs CVLT Change")

p4 <- ggplot(raw_dat, aes(x = MCP_1, y = CORT_CNG3)) +
  geom_point() + geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  labs(title = "MCP-1 vs Cortical Thickness Change")

library(patchwork)
(p1 | p2) / (p3 | p4)
```

```{r}
# Normality checks (regression assumption)
par(mfrow = c(2, 2))
for (v in names(raw_dat)) {
  qqnorm(raw_dat[[v]], main = paste("Q-Q:", v))
  qqline(raw_dat[[v]], col = "red")
}

```

```{r}
# Aim 1 planned sample size
N_aim1 <- 175   

# Aim 2 planned sample size
N_aim2 <- 125 

# Main alpha used in tables/figures
alpha_main <- 0.05

# sensitivity alphas for Aim 1
alpha_grid_aim1 <- c(0.05, 0.025)

# Target power levels
target_power_grid <- c(0.80, 0.90)

```

```{r}
# Aim 1 model structure:
# outcome_change ~ marker + baseline_outcome + covariates
# Age + sex are certain; APOE, BMI, BP, hypercholesterolemia, CDR, GDS,
# NSAID, immune conditions are candidate confounders/precision variables.
# Final set selected based on correlation with both marker and outcome.
# plausible range of reduced-model sizes:
#   p = 3  : baseline outcome + age + sex
#   p = 8  : plus 5 additional covariates
#   p = 12  : plus 9 additional covariates
p_ctrl_grid <- c(3, 8, 12)

# Four inflammatory markers in the grant aims
markers <- c("IL-6", "TNF-alpha", "MCP-1", "Eotaxin-1")

# Six outcomes in the grant aims
outcomes <- c("CVLT_20del", "CVLT_RecDp", "Benson_15",
              "MST", "StoryRecall", "Cortical")

```

```{r}
## Pairwise correlations
cor_mat <- cor(raw_dat, use = "complete.obs")
round(cor_mat, 3)

# Preliminary observed marker-outcome correlations
corr_tbl <- tibble(
  Marker  = c("IL-6", "IL-6", "MCP-1", "MCP-1"),
  Outcome = c("CVLT_20del", "Cortical", "CVLT_20del", "Cortical"),
  r_marginal = c(
    cor(raw_dat$IL_6,  raw_dat$CVLT_CNG3,  use = "complete.obs"),
    cor(raw_dat$IL_6,  raw_dat$CORT_CNG3,  use = "complete.obs"),
    cor(raw_dat$MCP_1, raw_dat$CVLT_CNG3,  use = "complete.obs"),
    cor(raw_dat$MCP_1, raw_dat$CORT_CNG3,  use = "complete.obs")
  )
) %>%
  mutate(abs_r_marginal = abs(r_marginal))

corr_tbl

# =============================================================================
# AIM 1 EFFECT SIZE ASSUMPTIONS
# =============================================================================

# Observed absolute marginal range
obs_min <- min(corr_tbl$abs_r_marginal)
obs_max <- max(corr_tbl$abs_r_marginal)

# Shrinkage factor to move from marginal to assumed partial correlation
shrink_main <- 0.75

# Build an assumed partial-correlation matrix for all 4 markers x 6 outcomes
# Two observed cells are anchored to raw_dat data for IL-6 and MCP-1;
# remaining cells are plausible values within the same general range.
pc_matrix <- matrix(
  c(
  #  CVLT_20del  CVLT_RecDp Benson_15  MST       StoryRecall Cortical
    -0.19,      -0.18,     -0.17,     -0.16,    -0.18,      -0.45,   # IL-6
    -0.17,      -0.16,     -0.15,     -0.14,    -0.16,      -0.38,   # TNF-alpha
    -0.24,      -0.22,     -0.20,     -0.19,    -0.22,      -0.51,   # MCP-1
    -0.18,      -0.17,     -0.16,     -0.15,    -0.17,      -0.34    # Eotaxin-1
  ),
  nrow = 4, byrow = TRUE,
  dimnames = list(markers, outcomes)
)

# These values were chosen to be slightly smaller than the observed marginal correlations and to preserve the same qualitative pattern: cortical thickness has stronger associations than memory measures.
```

```{r}
# =============================================================================
# AIM 1 POWER: SINGLE-MARKER MODELS
# =============================================================================
# Uses powertools::mlrF.partial()

aim1_results <- expand.grid(
  Marker = markers,
  Outcome = outcomes,
  p_ctrl = p_ctrl_grid,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    Source = case_when(
      Marker %in% c("IL-6", "MCP-1") & Outcome %in% c("CVLT_20del", "Cortical") ~
        "Anchored to preliminary data",
      TRUE ~ "Assumed within plausible range"
    ),
    pc_signed = pc_matrix[Marker, Outcome],
    pc = abs(pc_signed),
    f2 = es.fsq.partial(pc = pc)$fsq,
    Power_alpha_0_05 = mlrF.partial(
      N = N_aim1, p = p_ctrl, q = 1, pc = pc, alpha = 0.05
    ),
    Power_alpha_0_025 = mlrF.partial(
      N = N_aim1, p = p_ctrl, q = 1, pc = pc, alpha = 0.025
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    pc_signed = round(pc_signed, 3),
    pc = round(pc, 3),
    f2 = round(f2, 4),
    Power_alpha_0_05 = round(Power_alpha_0_05, 3),
    Power_alpha_0_025 = round(Power_alpha_0_025, 3)
  )

aim1_results

# Wide table for cleaner presentation
aim1_power_table <- aim1_results %>%
  select(Marker, Outcome, p_ctrl, Power_alpha_0_05, Power_alpha_0_025)

aim1_power_table


# Minimum detectable partial correlation at fixed N
find_min_pc <- function(target_power, N, p, q = 1, alpha = 0.05) {
  f <- function(pc) {
    mlrF.partial(N = N, p = p, q = q, pc = pc, alpha = alpha) - target_power
  }
  uniroot(f, interval = c(0.001, 0.999))$root
}

aim1_mde_tbl <- tibble(p_ctrl = p_ctrl_grid) %>%
  mutate(
    min_detectable_pc_80 = sapply(p_ctrl, function(p)
      find_min_pc(target_power = 0.80, N = N_aim1, p = p, q = 1, alpha = 0.05)
    ),
    min_detectable_pc_90 = sapply(p_ctrl, function(p)
      find_min_pc(target_power = 0.90, N = N_aim1, p = p, q = 1, alpha = 0.05)
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    min_detectable_pc_80 = round(min_detectable_pc_80, 3),
    min_detectable_pc_90 = round(min_detectable_pc_90, 3)
  )

aim1_mde_tbl



# Required sample size table for a grid of assumed partial correlations
find_required_N <- function(pc, p, alpha, target_power, q = 1) {
  f <- function(N) {
    mlrF.partial(N = N, p = p, q = q, pc = pc, alpha = alpha) - target_power
  }
  
  ceiling(uniroot(f, interval = c(p + q + 10, 5000))$root)
}

aim1_pc_grid <- c(0.15, 0.20, 0.25, 0.30, 0.35, 0.40, 0.50)

aim1_n_tbl <- crossing(
  pc = aim1_pc_grid,
  p_ctrl = p_ctrl_grid,
  alpha = c(0.05, 0.025),
  target_power = c(0.80, 0.90)
) %>%
  mutate(
    required_N = pmap_dbl(
      list(pc, p_ctrl, alpha, target_power),
      ~ find_required_N(
        pc = ..1,
        p = ..2,
        alpha = ..3,
        target_power = ..4,
        q = 1
      )
    )
  )


aim1_n_tbl


# =============================================================================
# AIM 1 TYPE I ERROR STRATEGY
# =============================================================================
# - correlated outcomes and correlated markers
# - mild correction is acceptable
# - Bonferroni across all 24 tests is too conservative
#
# We therefore present primary power at alpha = 0.05 and sensitivity at 0.025.

# =============================================================================
# AIM 2 POWER VIA DIFFERENCE IN CORRELATIONS
# =============================================================================
# Tasha confirmed the interaction can be represented as a difference in slopes,
# or equivalently as a difference in correlations between amyloid groups.
#
# For power only, use dichotomous amyloid: amyloid+ vs amyloid-
#
# Primary analysis in the grant can still use continuous amyloid burden.

# Main amyloid prevalence scenario for power
amyloid_splits <- tribble(
  ~split_label, ~prop_pos, ~prop_neg,
  "30/70",       0.30,      0.70,
  "40/60",       0.40,      0.60,
  "50/50",       0.50,      0.50
)

# Main effect-size scenarios for Aim 2
aim2_scenarios <- tribble(
  ~Scenario,   ~Outcome,   ~rho_pos, ~rho_neg,
  "Small",     "Memory",   -0.35,    -0.15,
  "Moderate",  "Memory",   -0.50,    -0.15,
  "Large",     "Memory",   -0.65,    -0.10,
  "Small",     "Cortical", -0.55,    -0.35,
  "Moderate",  "Cortical", -0.70,    -0.35,
  "Large",     "Cortical", -0.80,    -0.20
)

# Power at planned N for main 40/60 split
main_split <- amyloid_splits %>% filter(split_label == "40/60")

n1_main <- round(N_aim2 * main_split$prop_pos)   # amyloid+
n2_main <- N_aim2 - n1_main                      # amyloid-
nratio_main <- n2_main / n1_main

cat(sprintf("Amyloid+ n = %d, Amyloid- n = %d, n.ratio = %.2f\n\n",
            n1_main, n2_main, nratio_main))

aim2_power_main <- aim2_scenarios %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    delta_r = abs(rho_pos - rho_neg),
    power = corr.2samp(
      n1 = n1_main, n.ratio = nratio_main,
      rho1 = rho_pos, rho2 = rho_neg,
      alpha = alpha_main, sides = 2
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    delta_r = round(delta_r, 2),
    power = round(power, 3)
  )

print(aim2_power_main)

# =============================================================================
# AIM 2 SENSITIVITY OVER AMYLOID GROUP SPLITS
# =============================================================================

aim2_split_sensitivity <- crossing(
  amyloid_splits,
  aim2_scenarios
) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    n_pos = round(N_aim2 * prop_pos),
    n_neg = N_aim2 - n_pos,
    nratio = n_neg / n_pos,
    delta_r = abs(rho_pos - rho_neg),
    power = corr.2samp(
      n1 = n_pos, n.ratio = nratio,
      rho1 = rho_pos, rho2 = rho_neg,
      alpha = alpha_main, sides = 2
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    delta_r = round(delta_r, 2),
    power = round(power, 3)
  )


print(aim2_split_sensitivity)


# =============================================================================
# AIM 2 REQUIRED SAMPLE SIZE
# =============================================================================

aim2_n_tbl <- crossing(
  amyloid_splits,
  aim2_scenarios,
  target_power = target_power_grid
) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    nratio = prop_neg / prop_pos,
    n1_required = corr.2samp(
      n1 = NULL, n.ratio = nratio,
      rho1 = rho_pos, rho2 = rho_neg,
      alpha = alpha_main, power = target_power, sides = 2
    ),
    n1_required = ceiling(n1_required),
    n2_required = ceiling(n1_required * nratio),
    total_N_required = n1_required + n2_required,
    delta_r = abs(rho_pos - rho_neg)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(delta_r = round(delta_r, 2))


print(aim2_n_tbl)


# =============================================================================
# AIM 2 MINIMUM DETECTABLE CORRELATION DIFFERENCE
# =============================================================================
# For a fixed planned sample size, find what rho_pos is needed to achieve 80%
# power given a specified rho_neg.

find_rho_pos_for_power <- function(rho_neg, n1, nratio, alpha = 0.05,
                                   target_power = 0.80,
                                   lower = -0.999, upper = -0.001) {

  fn <- function(rho_pos) {
    corr.2samp(
      n1 = n1, n.ratio = nratio,
      rho1 = rho_pos, rho2 = rho_neg,
      alpha = alpha, sides = 2
    ) - target_power
  }

  out <- uniroot(fn, lower = lower, upper = upper)$root
  out
}

mde_aim2_tbl <- tibble(
  Outcome = c("Memory", "Cortical"),
  rho_neg = c(-0.15, -0.35)
) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    rho_pos_needed = find_rho_pos_for_power(
      rho_neg = rho_neg,
      n1 = n1_main,
      nratio = nratio_main,
      alpha = alpha_main,
      target_power = 0.80
    ),
    delta_r_needed = abs(rho_pos_needed - rho_neg)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    rho_pos_needed = round(rho_pos_needed, 3),
    delta_r_needed = round(delta_r_needed, 3)
  )

print(mde_aim2_tbl)
```

```{r}
# =============================================================================
# AIM 2 POWER FIGURE
# =============================================================================

N_grid <- seq(80, 220, by = 5)

aim2_power_curve_df <- crossing(
  N_total = N_grid,
  aim2_scenarios %>% filter(Outcome == "Memory"),
  amyloid_splits %>% filter(split_label %in% c("40/60", "50/50"))
) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    n_pos = round(N_total * prop_pos),
    n_neg = N_total - n_pos,
    nratio = n_neg / n_pos,
    power = corr.2samp(
      n1 = n_pos, n.ratio = nratio,
      rho1 = rho_pos, rho2 = rho_neg,
      alpha = alpha_main, sides = 2
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(aim2_power_curve_df,
       aes(x = N_total, y = power, linetype = Scenario)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.80, linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.90, linewidth = 0.4) +
  facet_wrap(~ split_label) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    title = "Aim 2 power to detect group differences in correlation",
    subtitle = "Memory outcome scenarios across amyloid prevalence assumptions",
    x = "Total sample size",
    y = "Power",
    linetype = "Scenario"
  )
```

```{r}
# =============================================================================
# TABLES FOR REPORT
# =============================================================================

# Preliminary correlation table
corr_tbl %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 3))) %>%
  kable(
    caption = "Preliminary marker-outcome correlations from the available pilot data"
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)

# Aim 1 power table
aim1_results %>%
  select(Marker, Outcome, Source, pc, f2, Power_alpha_0_05, Power_alpha_0_025) %>%
  kable(
    caption = "Aim 1 power for single-marker regression models under assumed partial-correlation scenarios"
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)

# Aim 1 sample-size table
aim1_n_tbl %>%
  kable(
    caption = "Aim 1 required sample size across assumed partial correlations"
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)

# Aim 2 main power table
aim2_power_main %>%
  kable(
    caption = "Aim 2 power for detecting differences in marker-outcome correlation by amyloid group"
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)

# Aim 2 split sensitivity
aim2_split_sensitivity %>%
  select(split_label, Scenario, Outcome, rho_pos, rho_neg, delta_r, power) %>%
  kable(
    caption = "Aim 2 sensitivity analysis across amyloid group prevalence scenarios"
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)

# Aim 2 sample size
aim2_n_tbl %>%
  select(split_label, Scenario, Outcome, rho_pos, rho_neg, delta_r,
         target_power, n1_required, n2_required, total_N_required) %>%
  kable(
    caption = "Aim 2 required sample size to detect group-specific correlation differences"
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)
```
